---
title: "Recommender Design Objectives as Market Primitives"
description: "Treating diversity, novelty, and long-tail exposure as objective primitives in recommender markets."
date: "2026-04-15"
categories: [recommender, market-design]
draft: false
---

## Motivation

Recommender systems are typically optimized for engagement, with diversity and novelty bolted on as constraints. An alternative is to treat these as **primitive objectives** in a market where users, content producers, and platforms have distinct preferences.

## Status

Conceptual / early modeling. Not yet a draft.
